𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰:

Extra food for the Chuuya fans because I'm tired and have wanted to do this silly thing for a while. Maybe this is an apology for the heavy angst ;)
But yeah, uh..virgin Chuuya? I can't explain why but I hold very true to this hc. He's probably too insecure or awkward to initiate anything with a partner so it never goes beyond some really intimate touching, yk?
